# Round Robin Sports Algo

> Smart MLB plays built for cash preservation, not lotto tickets: high-floor anchors, small-legged parlays, and round-robin hedging. Every pick is graded the next morning against a verified track record.

Verified track record: 69.4% on 9947 graded plays on the published daily card (2026-03-26 to 2026-06-08), each graded next morning vs the official box score. Every published pick is graded the next morning against the official box score.

## Key pages
- Latest picks: https://rrsalgo.com/
- Verified track record: https://rrsalgo.com/record/
- Archive of all editions: https://rrsalgo.com/archive/

## About
Round Robin Sports Algo publishes daily MLB betting picks and DFS plays (hits, runs, RBI,
strikeouts and more), split into Early, Midday and Night slate editions, plus a
morning recap that grades the prior day. Free editions are published here; full
lines, stakes and the highest-conviction EV card are available to members.
